scripts.pages:build: npx opennextjs-cloudflare build && mkdir -p .open-next/assets/_worker.js && cp .open-next/worker.js .open-next/assets/_worker.js/index.js && cp -r .open-next/server-functions .open-next/assets/_worker.js/ && rm -rf .open-next/assets/_worker.js/server-functions/*/node_modules && cp -r .open-next/cloudflare .open-next/assets/_worker.js/ && cp -r .open-next/middleware .open-next/assets/_worker.js/ && cp -r .open-next/.build .open-next/assets/_worker.js/
scripts.worker:start: echo 'Blog generation has moved to blog-generator/ project. Use: cd blog-generator && npm run dev'
